name: Jeb Bush
subject: When I wake up:
body:
Friend,

When I woke up this morning and got started with my day there were two things that came to mind.

1. Winning the White House and fixing Washington so every American again has the right to rise.
2. Having the resources to do it.

That's why I'm emailing you. **On Friday at midnight, we 'll hit our July fundraising deadline, and without your support, we will miss our goal of $150,000.**

[**With only 4 days to go, I need you to chip in $100, $50, $25, or even $5 immediately.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ampzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcmbkkb_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Friend, the time for talk is over. We have to send a message with this deadline: **we will not stand for another 4 years of Democrat White House control.**

But I can't do that without you. I need you now.

Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or even $5 right now: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dtckzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbtgppt_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

I'll make you this promise: I won't yield an inch in this fight. I'll go everywhere and talk with everyone, and with your help, we'll ensure the Hillary doesn't get the keys to 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue again.

The only question left in my mind is, can I count on you to help us hit our goal of $150,000 right now: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mctgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcwqqq_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tlhfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtlwzzh_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1450&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

On Friday at midnight, we 'll hit our July fundraising deadline, and without your support, we will miss our goal of $150,000. Friend, the time for talk is over. name: Mike Huckabee - Personal
subject: Obama directly attacks me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
Friend, This weekend, I warned of the possible consequences of giving Iran a nuclear bomb. This morning I awoke to see that President Obama had called my comments "ridiculous and sad." What's "ridiculous and sad" is that President Obama does not take Iran's repeated threats seriously. For decades, Iranian leaders have pledged to "destroy," "annihilate," and "wipe Israel off the map" with a "big Holocaust." "Never again" will be the policy of my administration and I will stand with our ally Israel to prevent the terrorists in Tehran from achieving their own stated goal of another Holocaust. **We must kill this deal with Iran.[Will you stand with me and co-sign my letter to Congress telling them to do their constitutional duty and not go on summer vacation until they reject the Obama-Kerry nuclear deal with Iran? --> MikeHuckabee.com/Iran](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYxOTYtYWEyMDkxYmUtNjJmZS00NzcxLWIxNGMtZTRhYjcxZDg0OWEyDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Y2ZkZDM5DQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lk1pa2VIdWNrYWJlZS5jb20vSXJhbj9zPTZWTEMNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t)** Not giving an inch, Mike Huckabee Sent from my iPad
---
Paid for by Huckabee for President
---

name: Hayden S
subject: FW: Can you check in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter -

Cam asked me to follow up with you.

I'm the data director for Chris Christie's presidential campaign,
and it is my job to make sure our supporter records are kept up
to date and accurate. I was reviewing our Founding Digital Member
roster this morning and noticed you weren't on the list, so I
wanted to personally follow up to ensure this isn't a mistake and
to make certain you've been receiving campaign updates. Here is
your supporter record:

Email ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Founding Digital Member Status: Not Active

Become a Member Below:

Suggested Donation Amount: $30 >>>
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43135744:18322890916:m:3:1516426255:81C0C465389B9AC61F322D87C98811B7:r

Our Founding Digital Members are our earliest supporters who have
made a financial commitment within the first 30 days of Governor
Christie's presidential campaign.

The deadline to become a Founding Digital Member ends on July
30th and, with time running out, we urge you to act now.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43135745:18322890916:m:3:1516426255:81C0C465389B9AC61F322D87C98811B7:r

Thank you,

Hayden Stone
Chris Christie 2016

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Cam Henderson, Finance Director
Date: Monday, July 27, 2015
Subject: Can you check in?
To: Hayden S, Data Director

Hayden, we've emailed all of our closest supporters to invite
them to join our Founding Digital Member team but it appears some
have yet to respond. Please let me know by the end of the day who
has signed up. The Governor specifically asked me to reach out to
all of his past supporters and I want to update him ASAP.

Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.

Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax
deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax
purposes.

You can view this email in your web browser here: http://email.vervemail.com/p/v6uNLTipNu

P.O. Box 9119
Morristown, NJ 07963
(973) 936-9318

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

You can unsubscribe instantly here: http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6uNLTipNu

name: Rand Paul
subject: They're attacking me by name
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Planned Parenthood is attacking me by name, and doing everything they can to stop my bill to strip them of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

I know as this fight gets hotter by the minute, their smear campaign will only intensify.

I'm not backing down. But I'm counting on you to stand with me.

I believe it's time for Congress to vote on defunding Planned Parenthood. Not next week. Not next month. But NOW.

I've filed a petition to secure a vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood. Under Senate rules, if enough of my colleagues stand with me, the Senate will have no choice but to allow a vote on my bill.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to stand with me in this fight by adding your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my petition to secure a vote on defunding Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348295:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r)**.

During my 17 years as a practicing physician, I treated premature babies almost every week.

I've cradled their small, precious bodies in the palm of one hand and looked into their eyes as they struggled to survive. Many of them weighed under two pounds.

Like most Americans, the thought of Planned Parenthood officials killing these babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit sickens my stomach.

Even those who don't value human life like you and I do are disgusted by Planned Parenthood's actions.

Yet the outrage that you and I feel isn't shared by many in Congress who would rather keep up business as usual than heed the will of the American people.

This is flat-out unacceptable.

I'm leading the fight to defund Planned Parenthood. **[And I'm counting on you to add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348295:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r)**.

And if you can, please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more!

Your generous gift will help me mobilize as many Republican voters across the country as possible to stand with me in this fight to end taxpayer funding of abortion.

Since Congress has the power of the purse, this is a fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House.

Studies show stopping funding for Planned Parenthood will result in more saved lives.

**[So Fellow Conservative, won't you please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away to help defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348295:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r)**?

It's up to you and me to ensure my colleagues in Congress take action. No one else will do it for us.

But with your help, I'm confident we can secure a vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

**[So please, add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my petition and chip in a contribution to help end taxpayer funding of abortion](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348295:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348295:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348296:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348297:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29348298:28140080586:m:1:879035888:5BE74DA3F0A7722028B62A0717DD94D9:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iscvOakmN6). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscvOakmN6)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscvOakmN6) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28140080586-echo3-83334AB215F1474EFF2C80493AA7A5AE@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Let me be very blunt and tell you why I am running.
body:
#
Friend -

As I travel across the country, I am constantly struck by the level of enthusiasm and engagement there is for the political process. Everywhere I go, from Portland, Maine to Phoenix, Arizona, Americans are ready to discuss the critical issues facing our country. And this Wednesday night, July 29th, over 70,000 individuals have signed up to attend organizing meetings in their communities.

It is clear to me that people are taking this primary very seriously, and as an early supporter of our campaign, you have a unique role to play in our success going forward.

**In that light, I wanted to make sure that you saw our new five minute video about the issues driving our campaign.**

**[Watch the video and make a $3 contribution to help us continue to build an organization capable of challenging the billionaire class in this campaign, and after I'm elected president.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6422/1546502547/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sneak-peek?refcode=em150727e-sneak-peek")**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6422/1546502547/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sneak-peek?refcode=em150727e-sneak-peek")

In the meantime, let me be very blunt and tell you why I am running.

This country faces more serious problems today than at any time in modern history, and establishment politics will not successfully resolve them.

Corporate greed is rampant, and the very rich keep growing richer while everyone else grows poorer. Despite an explosion in technology and a huge increase in productivity, the middle class continues to disappear, most Americans work longer hours for lower wages, and 45 million live in poverty.

The skyrocketing level of income and wealth inequality is not only grotesque and immoral, it is economically unsustainable. It is unconscionable that 99% of all new income goes to the top 1%. It is absurd that the top one-tenth of 1% own almost as much wealth as the bottom 90%, and that one family (the Waltons of Walmart) has more wealth than the bottom 130 million Americans.

As a result of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling on Citizens United, the billionaire class is spending huge amounts of money to buy candidates and elections. We are now witnessing the undermining of American democracy and the rapid movement toward oligarchy where a handful of very wealthy families and their Super PACs will control our government.

The scientific community is virtually unanimous in telling us that climate change is real, is caused by human activity, and is already bringing catastrophic damage to our planet. Yet, the Republican Party is prepared to reject science in order to gain campaign contributions from the Koch brothers, Big Energy companies and others who make billions on fossil fuels. If we do not act boldly on climate change, the planet we leave to our grandchildren may be uninhabitable.

The United States once led the world in terms of the percentage of our young people who had college degrees. Today, in a highly competitive global economy, we are now in 12th place. Hundreds of thousands of bright young people have given up on the dream of higher education, while millions of others leave school with oppressive debt.

Our infrastructure -- roads, bridges, rail, airports, water systems, wastewater plants, levees, dams -- is crumbling, and Congress refuses to appropriate anywhere near the necessary funds to rebuild it. If we do not invest substantially in infrastructure, a bad situation will only become much worse.

Despite substantial gains, we still have a long way to go to achieve equality for minorities. Instead of investing in opportunities, we are locking people up at an incredible rate. We now have the highest incarceration rate in the entire world with over 2 million in prison and millions more on probation or parole. We have a broken immigration system that divides families and keeps millions of hard-working people in the shadows.

Most of the major Wall Street financial institutions that we bailed out because they were "too big to fail," are now bigger than they used to be. The six largest financial institutions now have assets equivalent to nearly 60% of our GDP, issue 35% of the mortgages, and oversee 65% of credit cards.

Our tax system is wildly unfair - rigged to benefit the very rich. Major corporations that earn billions in profits stash their money in tax havens and pay nothing in federal income taxes, while billionaire hedge fund managers pay a lower effective tax rate than nurses or teachers.

Despite growing poverty among seniors, almost all Republicans, and some Democrats, want to cut Social Security and benefits for disabled veterans. They want more austerity for the elderly, the children, the sick and the poor, and more tax breaks for the rich.

The wars in Iraq and Afghanistan have cost us thousands of lives and trillions of dollars. The United States spends more on the military than the next nine biggest-spending countries combined. Today, there are massive cost over-runs with defense contractors and the Pentagon cannot even pass an independent audit.

We are at a moment of truth. We need to face up to the reality of where we are as a nation, and we need a mass movement of people to change that reality.

Let's be clear. This campaign is not about Bernie Sanders. It's about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: "Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires."

I have discussed some of the major crises that we face. Let me give you the outline of an agenda which addresses these problems.

**Jobs, Jobs, Jobs** : The truth is that real unemployment in our country is not the "official" and widely-reported 5.4 percent. Counting those who are underemployed and those who have given up looking for work, real unemployment is almost 11 percent. Even more disturbingly, real unemployment for white and Hispanic youth is over 30 percent, while African-American youth unemployment is over 50 percent.

We need a major federal jobs program. The most effective way to do that is to rebuild our crumbling infrastructure. To do that, I have introduced legislation which would invest $1 trillion over 5 years to modernize our country's physical infrastructure. This would create and maintain at least 13 million good-paying jobs. It would also make our country more productive, efficient and safe.

As a member of Congress who voted against NAFTA, CAFTA, Permanent Normal Trade Relations with China (PNTR) and is helping to lead the opposition against the TPP, I will continue my opposition to trade policies which have cost us millions of decent paying jobs as corporate America shuts down plants here and moves them to low-wage countries.

**Raising Wages** : Today, millions of Americans are working for starvation wages and median family income has declined by almost $5,000 since 1999. The current federal minimum wage of $7.25 an hour is totally inadequate. We need to raise the minimum wage to a living wage - $15 an hour over the next few years. Our goal must be that no full-time worker in this country lives in poverty. We must also bring about pay equity for women. There is no rational reason why women should be earning 78 cents on the dollar compared to men who perform the same work.

Further, we need to implement "family values" for American working families. It is unacceptable that the United States is the only major country on earth that does not guarantee family and medical leave, sick time and paid vacations.

**Wealth and Income Inequality** : Today, the richest 400 Americans own over $2.2 trillion in wealth, more than the bottom 150 million Americans combined. Meanwhile, nearly half of all Americans have less than $10,000 in savings and have no idea how they will be able to retire with dignity.

In order to reverse the massive transfer of wealth and income from the middle class to the very rich that we have seen in recent years, we need real tax reform which makes the wealthy and profitable corporations begin to pay their fair share of taxes. It is fiscally irresponsible that the U.S. Treasury loses about $100 billion a year because corporations and the rich stash their profits in the Cayman Islands, Bermuda and other tax havens.

We need a tax system which is fair and progressive. Children should not go hungry in this country while profitable corporations and the wealthy avoid their tax responsibilities.

**Reforming Wall Street** : I have introduced legislation which would break up the largest financial institutions in the country. In my view, if a bank is too big to fail, it is too big to exist. Wall Street cannot continue to be an island unto itself investing trillions in risky financial instruments. We need banks that invest in the job-creating productive economy. We do not need more speculation and gambling in casino-type activities.

**Campaign Finance Reform** : We need to return to a one-person, one-vote democracy. It is not acceptable that the Koch brothers and other billionaires are spending endless sums of money to buy elections. I have introduced legislation which would overturn the horrendous Citizens United decision and will only appoint Supreme Court justices who are prepared to do that. We must also demand disclosure of all large campaign contributions. Long term, we need to move to public funding of elections.

**Fighting Climate Change** : The United States must lead the world in reversing climate change and make certain that this planet is habitable for our children and grandchildren. We must transform our energy system away from fossil fuels and into energy efficiency and sustainable energies. Millions of homes and buildings need to be weatherized, our transportation system needs to be energy efficient and we need to greatly accelerate the progress we are already seeing in wind, solar, geothermal and other forms of sustainable energy. Transforming our energy system will not only protect the environment, it will create good-paying jobs.

**Health Care for All** : The United States remains the only major country on earth that does not guarantee health care for all as a right. Despite the modest gains of the Affordable Care Act, 35 million Americans continue to lack health insurance and many more are under-insured. Yet, we continue paying far more per capita for health care than any other nation. The United States must move toward a Medicare-for-All single-payer system.

**Protecting Our Most Vulnerable** : Today, the United States has more people living in poverty than at almost any time in the modern history of our country. We have the highest rate of childhood poverty of any major nation, and millions of seniors and people with disabilities struggle to put food on the table because of insufficient Social Security benefits.

In my view, we have a moral responsibility to make certain that no American goes hungry or sleeps on the street. We must also make certain that seniors and people with disabilities can live in dignity. Not only must we vigorously oppose Republican attacks on the social safety net, we must expand benefits for those most in need. That is why I have recently introduced legislation which would extend the solvency of Social Security until 2065, while increasing benefits for those most in need.

**Expanding Opportunity and Equality** : We need to stop using prisons as a response to poverty. Our criminal justice system needs to be reformed so that we do not continue to house non-violent offenders at huge expense when that money could be used to rebuild communities and create opportunity. We need federal leadership to reform policing in America, to end racial profiling, and to fight the illegal activities of hate groups. We need comprehensive immigration reform that protects families and leads to a responsible and realistic path to citizenship.

**Dismantling Structural Racism** : Throughout much of our history, the elite in America has divided people along racial lines in an effort to consolidate wealth and power. We need to simultaneously address the structural and institutional racism which exists in this country while at the same time vigorously attacking the grotesque level of income and wealth inequality which is making the very rich much richer, and everyone else - especially the African-American community - much poorer. Meanwhile, too many people of color in this country find themselves subjected to a system that treats citizens who have not committed crimes like criminals. We have more people locked up in jail than any other country on earth. We need to invest in jobs and education, not jails and incarceration. Finally, no person should have to worry that a routine interaction with law enforcement will end in violence and death. Black lives matter: we must reform our criminal justice system, move away from the militarization of police forces, and invest in community policing.

**College for All** : The United States must join Germany and many other countries in understanding that investing in our young people's education is investing in the future of our nation. I have introduced legislation to make tuition in public colleges and universities free, as well as substantially lowering interest rates on student loans.

**War and Peace** : I voted against the war in Iraq, and that was the right vote. We must be vigorous in combatting terrorism, but we can't do it alone. We must be part of an international coalition that includes Muslim nations which not only defeats ISIS but which works hard to create conditions for lasting peace. I will vigorously oppose an endless war in the Middle East.

My approach to campaigning is pretty simple and straight-forward. We hold a lot of public meetings in towns that are big and small. People ask questions and make comments. We discuss the important issues facing our country. And that's it. Nothing very fancy. It's called democracy and I like that approach very much. It's something I've done my whole political life.

I hope very much that you will join me at one of our meetings. I hope that you will become part of our campaign team. **And I hope that you will watch our video and make a contribution to our campaign** :

**[https://go.berniesanders.com/sneak-peek](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6422/1546502547/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sneak-peek?refcode=em150727e-sneak-peek")**

Let us never forget: This country belongs to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires.

Sincerely,

Senator Bernie Sanders
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6422/1546502547/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sneak-peek?refcode=em150727e-sneak-peek")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6423/1546502547/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6420/1546502547/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d6421/1546502547/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20e0/43f17890/5cdd7cb9/621d642e/1546502547/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Friend - As I travel across the country, I am constantly struck by the level of enthusiasm and engagement there is for the political process. Everywhere I go, from Portland, Maine to Phoenix, Arizona, Americans are ready to discuss the critical issues facing our country. And this Wednesday night, July 29th, over 70,000 individuals have signed up to attend organizing meetings in their communities. It is clear to me that people are taking this primary very seriously, and as an early supporter of our campaign, you have a unique role to play in our success going forward. In that light, I wanted to make sure that you saw our new five minute video about the issues driving our campaign. "" "" In the meantime, let me be very blunt and tell you why I am running. This country faces more serious problems today than at any time in modern history, and establishment politics will not successfully resolve them. Corporate greed is rampant, and the very rich keep growing richer while everyone else grows poorer. Despite an explosion in technology and a huge increase in productivity, the middle class continues to disappear, most Americans work longer hours for lower wages, and 45 million live in poverty. The skyrocketing level of income and wealth inequality is not only grotesque and immoral, it is economically unsustainable. It is unconscionable that 99% of all new income goes to the top 1%. It is absurd that the top one-tenth of 1% own almost as much wealth as the bottom 90%, and that one family (the Waltons of Walmart) has more wealth than the bottom 130 million Americans. As a result of the disastrous Supreme Court ruling on Citizens United, the billionaire class is spending huge amounts of money to buy candidates and elections. We are now witnessing the undermining of American democracy and the rapid movement toward oligarchy where a handful of very wealthy families and their Super PACs will control our government. The scientific community is virtually unanimous in telling us that climate change is real, is caused by human activity, and is already bringing catastrophic damage to our planet. Yet, the Republican Party is prepared to reject science in order to gain campaign contributions from the Koch brothers, Big Energy companies and others who make billions on fossil fuels. If we do not act boldly on climate change, the planet we leave to our grandchildren may be uninhabitable. The United States once led the world in terms of the percentage of our young people who had college degrees. Today, in a highly competitive global economy, we are now in 12th place. Hundreds of thousands of bright young people have given up on the dream of higher education, while millions of others leave school with oppressive debt. Our infrastructure -- roads, bridges, rail, airports, water systems, wastewater plants, levees, dams -- is crumbling, and Congress refuses to appropriate anywhere near the necessary funds to rebuild it. If we do not invest substantially in infrastructure, a bad situation will only become much worse. Despite substantial gains, we still have a long way to go to achieve equality for minorities. Instead of investing in opportunities, we are locking people up at an incredible rate. We now have the highest incarceration rate in the entire world with over 2 million in prison and millions more on probation or parole. We have a broken immigration system that divides families and keeps millions of hard-working people in the shadows. Most of the major Wall Street financial institutions that we bailed out because they were "too big to fail," are now bigger than they used to be. The six largest financial institutions now have assets equivalent to nearly 60% of our GDP, issue 35% of the mortgages, and oversee 65% of credit cards. Our tax system is wildly unfair - rigged to benefit the very rich. Major corporations that earn billions in profits stash their money in tax havens and pay nothing in federal income taxes, while billionaire hedge fund managers pay a lower effective tax rate than nurses or teachers. Despite growing poverty among seniors, almost all Republicans, and some Democrats, want to cut Social Security and benefits for disabled veterans. They want more austerity for the elderly, the children, the sick and the poor, and more tax breaks for the rich. The wars in Iraq and Afghanistan have cost us thousands of lives and trillions of dollars. The United States spends more on the military than the next nine biggest-spending countries combined. Today, there are massive cost over-runs with defense contractors and the Pentagon cannot even pass an independent audit. We are at a moment of truth. We need to face up to the reality of where we are as a nation, and we need a mass movement of people to change that reality. Let's be clear. This campaign is not about Bernie Sanders. It's about a grassroots movement of Americans standing up and saying: "Enough is enough. This country and our government belong to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires." I have discussed some of the major crises that we face. Let me give you the outline of an agenda which addresses these problems. Jobs, Jobs, Jobs : The truth is that real unemployment in our country is not the "official" and widely-reported 5.4 percent. Counting those who are underemployed and those who have given up looking for work, real unemployment is almost 11 percent. Even more disturbingly, real unemployment for white and Hispanic youth is over 30 percent, while African-American youth unemployment is over 50 percent. We need a major federal jobs program. The most effective way to do that is to rebuild our crumbling infrastructure. To do that, I have introduced legislation which would invest $1 trillion over 5 years to modernize our country's physical infrastructure. This would create and maintain at least 13 million good-paying jobs. It would also make our country more productive, efficient and safe. As a member of Congress who voted against NAFTA, CAFTA, Permanent Normal Trade Relations with China (PNTR) and is helping to lead the opposition against the TPP, I will continue my opposition to trade policies which have cost us millions of decent paying jobs as corporate America shuts down plants here and moves them to low-wage countries. Raising Wages : Today, millions of Americans are working for starvation wages and median family income has declined by almost $5,000 since 1999. The current federal minimum wage of $7.25 an hour is totally inadequate. We need to raise the minimum wage to a living wage - $15 an hour over the next few years. Our goal must be that no full-time worker in this country lives in poverty. We must also bring about pay equity for women. There is no rational reason why women should be earning 78 cents on the dollar compared to men who perform the same work. Further, we need to implement "family values" for American working families. It is unacceptable that the United States is the only major country on earth that does not guarantee family and medical leave, sick time and paid vacations. Wealth and Income Inequality : Today, the richest 400 Americans own over $2.2 trillion in wealth, more than the bottom 150 million Americans combined. Meanwhile, nearly half of all Americans have less than $10,000 in savings and have no idea how they will be able to retire with dignity. In order to reverse the massive transfer of wealth and income from the middle class to the very rich that we have seen in recent years, we need real tax reform which makes the wealthy and profitable corporations begin to pay their fair share of taxes. It is fiscally irresponsible that the U.S. Treasury loses about $100 billion a year because corporations and the rich stash their profits in the Cayman Islands, Bermuda and other tax havens. We need a tax system which is fair and progressive. Children should not go hungry in this country while profitable corporations and the wealthy avoid their tax responsibilities. Reforming Wall Street : I have introduced legislation which would break up the largest financial institutions in the country. In my view, if a bank is too big to fail, it is too big to exist. Wall Street cannot continue to be an island unto itself investing trillions in risky financial instruments. We need banks that invest in the job-creating productive economy. We do not need more speculation and gambling in casino-type activities. Campaign Finance Reform : We need to return to a one-person, one-vote democracy. It is not acceptable that the Koch brothers and other billionaires are spending endless sums of money to buy elections. I have introduced legislation which would overturn the horrendous Citizens United decision and will only appoint Supreme Court justices who are prepared to do that. We must also demand disclosure of all large campaign contributions. Long term, we need to move to public funding of elections. Fighting Climate Change : The United States must lead the world in reversing climate change and make certain that this planet is habitable for our children and grandchildren. We must transform our energy system away from fossil fuels and into energy efficiency and sustainable energies. Millions of homes and buildings need to be weatherized, our transportation system needs to be energy efficient and we need to greatly accelerate the progress we are already seeing in wind, solar, geothermal and other forms of sustainable energy. Transforming our energy system will not only protect the environment, it will create good-paying jobs. Health Care for All : The United States remains the only major country on earth that does not guarantee health care for all as a right. Despite the modest gains of the Affordable Care Act, 35 million Americans continue to lack health insurance and many more are under-insured. Yet, we continue paying far more per capita for health care than any other nation. The United States must move toward a Medicare-for-All single-payer system. Protecting Our Most Vulnerable : Today, the United States has more people living in poverty than at almost any time in the modern history of our country. We have the highest rate of childhood poverty of any major nation, and millions of seniors and people with disabilities struggle to put food on the table because of insufficient Social Security benefits. In my view, we have a moral responsibility to make certain that no American goes hungry or sleeps on the street. We must also make certain that seniors and people with disabilities can live in dignity. Not only must we vigorously oppose Republican attacks on the social safety net, we must expand benefits for those most in need. That is why I have recently introduced legislation which would extend the solvency of Social Security until 2065, while increasing benefits for those most in need. Expanding Opportunity and Equality : We need to stop using prisons as a response to poverty. Our criminal justice system needs to be reformed so that we do not continue to house non-violent offenders at huge expense when that money could be used to rebuild communities and create opportunity. We need federal leadership to reform policing in America, to end racial profiling, and to fight the illegal activities of hate groups. We need comprehensive immigration reform that protects families and leads to a responsible and realistic path to citizenship. Dismantling Structural Racism : Throughout much of our history, the elite in America has divided people along racial lines in an effort to consolidate wealth and power. We need to simultaneously address the structural and institutional racism which exists in this country while at the same time vigorously attacking the grotesque level of income and wealth inequality which is making the very rich much richer, and everyone else - especially the African-American community - much poorer. Meanwhile, too many people of color in this country find themselves subjected to a system that treats citizens who have not committed crimes like criminals. We have more people locked up in jail than any other country on earth. We need to invest in jobs and education, not jails and incarceration. Finally, no person should have to worry that a routine interaction with law enforcement will end in violence and death. Black lives matter: we must reform our criminal justice system, move away from the militarization of police forces, and invest in community policing. College for All : The United States must join Germany and many other countries in understanding that investing in our young people's education is investing in the future of our nation. I have introduced legislation to make tuition in public colleges and universities free, as well as substantially lowering interest rates on student loans. War and Peace : I voted against the war in Iraq, and that was the right vote. We must be vigorous in combatting terrorism, but we can't do it alone. We must be part of an international coalition that includes Muslim nations which not only defeats ISIS but which works hard to create conditions for lasting peace. I will vigorously oppose an endless war in the Middle East. My approach to campaigning is pretty simple and straight-forward. We hold a lot of public meetings in towns that are big and small. People ask questions and make comments. We discuss the important issues facing our country. And that's it. Nothing very fancy. It's called democracy and I like that approach very much. It's something I've done my whole political life. I hope very much that you will join me at one of our meetings. I hope that you will become part of our campaign team. And I hope that you will watch our video and make a contribution to our campaign : "" Let us never forget: This country belongs to all of us, not just a handful of billionaires. Sincerely, Senator Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Take a stand against unlawful redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Stand up for fair districts today! Friend -- Florida is a battleground state. There's no question about that. But there's one thing we shouldn't be fighting about, and that's unlawful redistricting. Gerrymandering. I want to get rid of illegal redistricting for good. [**Add your name today if you agree.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2012/738133e4/39354b4f/7f936c4f/3566624555/VEsH/ "http://www.grassrootsforchange.com/end-gerrymandering?utm_source=murphy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=redistricting") Last month, the Supreme Court passed a decision so voters could create district maps through independent, non-partisan commissions. And the Florida Legislature will soon be holding a special session to approve a new congressional district map that takes partisanship out of the process. This is great news -- constituents should be able to fairly elect their representatives without those same representatives redrawing their own districts to stay in office. **But we're not safe until gerrymandering is gone for good.** I want to make sure your voice is heard in Congress. That's why I've partnered with Independent Lines Advocacy to make unlawful redistricting a thing of the past. Will you join me and add your name today? [**Sign our petition to end the corruption of gerrymandering.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2012/738133e4/39354b4f/7f936c4f/3566624555/VEsE/ "http://www.grassrootsforchange.com/end-gerrymandering?utm_source=murphy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=redistricting") Thanks, Patrick Murphy | **[TAKE ACTION »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2012/738133e4/39354b4f/7f936c4f/3566624555/VEsF/ "http://www.grassrootsforchange.com/end-gerrymandering?utm_source=murphy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=redistricting")**
---

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2012/738133e4/39354b4f/7f936c48/3566624555/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2012/738133e4/39354b4f/7f936c49/3566624555/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2012/738133e4/39354b4f/7f936c4a/3566624555/VEsA/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: A possible breakthrough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Your phone calls into Capitol Hill are working.

Minutes ago I became aware of a possible breakthrough to secure a vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

But you and I cannot sit on the sidelines and hope Congress does the right thing.

I need your help right away to keep up the pressure -- and there isn't a moment to spare.

So please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and then **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of my petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351345:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r)** to secure a vote on defunding Planned Parenthood.

Like most Americans, I recoiled in horror as I watched Dr. Nucatola brazenly discuss over a bowl of salad how she skirted the federal ban on partial birth abortion and killed unborn babies to ensure she could harvest their organs for sale, stating:

"We've been very good at getting heart, lung, liver, because we know that, I'm not gonna crush that part, I'm gonna basically crush below, I'm gonna crush above, and I'm gonna see if I can get it all intact."

And another gut-wrenching video shows Planned Parenthood officials squabbling over the price of aborted baby parts because one official joked she wanted to buy a Lamborghini.

Fellow Conservative, hard-working taxpayers are being forced to fund Planned Parenthood's killing and selling of aborted baby body parts for profit to the tune of over half a BILLION dollars a year.

With your help, I hope to put the brakes on Planned Parenthood's taxpayer funded gravy train.

That's why I'm counting on you to call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and then **[add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351345:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r)**.

And if at all possible, I hope you'll agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more!

My campaign has already sent millions of emails over the past week mobilizing grassroots conservatives to join my fight to defund Planned Parenthood.

Your generous gift will help me contact and mobilize even more folks across the country to stand with me in this fight to end taxpayer funding for Planned Parenthood.

**[So Fellow Conservative, won't you please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away to help me secure a vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351345:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r)**?

Time is short. Please act right away.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351345:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351346:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351347:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29351348:28141804425:m:1:879035888:A31F287F5102868DC9405662DCD3713D:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWTSyzkmxN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTSyzkmxN)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTSyzkmxN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28141804425-echo3-ACABCC1A97CF30EE10968A90284630A5@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

[](http://www.paramountcommunication.com)**

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Alert: (on the list)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Alert: _Roll Call_ 's Top Races to Watch in 2016 - we're on the list!
**[Give $5 now to help us win in 2016!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394dba9/1119309028/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072715_nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Give+5+now+to+help+us+win+in+2016&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** Friend,

One thing is clear: all eyes are on what's happening in Maryland.
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394dba2/1119309028/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072715_d&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")
_Roll Call_ knows this is a big race. The _Washington Post_ and _Politico_ have already said Democrats can take back the Senate, and when we do, it matters who is there to help lead the Democratic majority.

No one can challenge Chris's record for getting things done. His reputation as the go-to person was established over a decade ago when _Time_ magazine called him "a hero to environmentalists, education groups and gun control advocates" in Maryland. Today, Chris remains an effective leader on key fights in Congress. From real solutions addressing gun violence to his legislation combating climate change to being a key member of the leadership team that passed the Affordable Care Act and Wall Street Reform, Chris is the proven leader we need in the Senate.

But we can't get him there without you. We need to raise $15,000 by midnight Friday to fight for every vote and win in 2016. **Can you chip in $5 right now?**

**[Click here to give $5 right now to help Chris win and put an effective progressive champion in the Senate.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394da65/1119309028/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072715_nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Click+here+to+give+5+right+now+to+help+C&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $3 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394da78/1119309028/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em072715_nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=10+-+Donate+3+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** **[Donate $10 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394da0e/1119309028/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em072715_nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=11+-+Donate+10+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** **[Donate $25 instantly.>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394da04/1119309028/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em072715_nd&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=12+-+Donate+25+instantly+gtgt&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394da1d/1119309028/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072715_nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=13+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")** Care about ending gun violence? Chris is the only candidate with real solutions - just last month he introduced a bill that would help states implement licensing laws for handgun purchasers. Leading gun violence-prevention advocates have said his bill is the most effective way to combat senseless gun deaths in our communities.

When it comes to standing up for our values, Chris has been there all along. He fought in Maryland to give LGBT couples the freedom to marry, long before the Supreme Court ruled in favor of equality nationwide.

That's what Chris is all about. Real progress, real solutions, not just talk.

We need Chris's effective leadership in the Senate, and we need your help to get him there.

**[Will you give $5 right now so we can fight for every vote and win in 2016?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91eb7/70cdc2ba/47935efc/394da29/1119309028/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_july31?refcode=em072715_nd&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=15+-+Will+you+give+5+right+now+so+we+can+figh&utm_campaign=em072715&source=em072715")**

Thank you. Let's win this thing.

Team Van Hollen

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Rick Santorum for President
subject: Just Stop It!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=1)
---
Friend --
Just stop it! That’s the message I have for every one of my fellow Republican candidates for President. Stop the ridiculous and senseless attacks on each other, because all you’re doing is putting a big smile on the faces of Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton. I didn’t decide to run for President to attack Republicans. I’m running for President to change America. And that includes ending the disastrous policies of the Obama/Clinton team that have weakened our country, economically and morally. And their disastrous decisions, such as the inept negotiations with the Iranian nuclear deal, have put our country’s national security in peril. But here’s the sad truth. While negative attacks get you much media attention, a positive vision is almost never covered. That’s why I have no choice but to begin to share my vision for America through expensive TV and radio advertising. And I can only afford to do that through generous contributions of friends like you. [**DONATE TODAY**](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/just_stop_it?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=2) I’m sure you know Karen and I are not independently wealthy. And with two children in college, and a third to start next year, we have no choice but to ask our friends for their help. Whether you can give $25 or $2,500 you will have our gratitude forever. I’m very anxious to share my plan to end the tax-code as we know it and the IRS with it, and instead give families a fairer flat tax. I want to share my plan for successfully defeating ISIS once and for all. And I want to let everyone know how I intend to put a stake through the heart of Common Core, and replace it with a common sense approach to better education. But without your help, unfortunately, I will not have the money to do that. You’ve been there for me in the past. And for that Karen and I will always be grateful. And we want to thank you in advance for helping us once again. Rick Santorum for President
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=3)

[ ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/just_stop_it?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=4)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=5).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=6) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=just_stop_it&n=7).
